programmes.show_description: 8 electrifying hours of power pop & rock legends! Every track's a banger, guaranteed to rock your socks off - if your speakers had muscles, this is what they would play!
Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights and iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made the 80s!
60 minutes of action from two of the early 80s' biggest acts - the Human League and Adam Ant (sometimes with his Ants!).
Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights and iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made the 80s!
Bruno Brookes has stories galore from 20 of rock and pop's real game changers. Icons, rebels, activists & a few of the more unexpected heroes who reshaped music & the media.
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
What was in the top five during the Easter holiday in the '80s? We choose three mega-hits from each year, 1980 to 1989, with Madonna, David Bowie, Bros, The Jam, Culture Club and more!
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
Two songs from each year of the '80s - all of them Record Breakers. Cheryl has the stories of best-selling songs, record-breaking fundraisers and the world's richest recording deal!

Singalong hits with the ultimate in dead catchy choruses, from Mickey and Tarzan Boy to Walk the Dinosaur and House of Fun.

programmes.show_name: Who Had The Most Hits in the 80s?
programmes.show_description: Counting down the 40 acts with more Top 10 hits to their names than any other stars of the decade. U2, Shaky, Queen, Wham! and Prince are all here, but who's No.1?
It's the weekend, and it's the 80s! Expect synth pop, soft rock, leg warmers, lycra and lots of big hair! Classic pop that has stood the test of time.
NOW 80s rolls out 5 hours of the fiercest females! From Cyndi and Madonna to Whitney, Bananarama and Kylie, it's wall-to-wall singalongs and unapologetic 80s fabulousness!
It's the weekend, and we're showing out! Classic pop that has stood the test of time.
Back to back songs that formed the glorious opening chapter of Whitney's glittering career. Every one an anthem.
It's the weekend, and we're showing out! Classic pop that has stood the test of time.

programmes.show_name: The Heritage Chart with Mike Read
programmes.show_description: Another episode of the Heritage Chart - new music by heritage acts! With Mike Read.
Non-stop '80s rock and power ballads - all night! From Queen, Bon Jovi and Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler and Tina Turner.
A two-hour run through, in order, of top three hits from the '80s - all with that rock 'n' roll swagger! Expect plenty of Queen, T'Pau, Bonnie Tyler and Blondie.
Non-stop '80s rock and power ballads - all night! From Queen, Bon Jovi and Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler and Tina Turner.
Rick's entire career of top 10 singles from 1987 to 1991. Plus a bonus of something more recent from 2018.

Two is better than one... good things come in pairs... you get the idea! Here are some 80s icons teaming up for some killer collaborations!
